nasb.text: Now the cherubim were standing on the right side of the temple when the man entered, and the cloud filled the inner court.

esv.text: Now the cherubim were standing on the south side of the house, when the man went in, and a cloud filled the inner court.

cnv.text: 那人進去的時候，基路伯站在殿的右邊，雲彩充滿了內院。

ccb.text: 当他进去的时候，基路伯天使站在殿的南边，内院充满了云彩。
